# Tianxiong Zhong - Design Portfolio (Full Context)

> Complete information about the portfolio website of Tianxiong Zhong, a design student at Hochschule München.

## Person

Name: Tianxiong Zhong
Role: Design Student
University: Hochschule München (Munich University of Applied Sciences)
University URL: https://design.hm.edu/
Location: München (Munich), Germany
Background: Former automotive engineer turned design student
Interests: Photography, visual storytelling, transportation design

## Contact Information

Email: t.zhong@hm.edu
Phone: +49 176-3066-0547
Street: Lothstraße 17
City: München
Postal Code: 80335
Country: Germany

## Social Profiles

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tianxiong-zhong
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/baerchenphoto (photography)

## Design Expertise

1. Transportation Design - Motorcycle concepts, automotive-inspired design
2. Industrial Design - Product design with engineering precision
3. Illustration - Visual storytelling, book illustration
4. Furniture Design - Minimalist, functional furniture

## Portfolio Projects

### 1. Tesla Cyberrad (Transportation Design)
URL: https://t-zhong.de/projects/tesla
A futuristic motorcycle concept inspired by Tesla's Cybertruck design language. The project explores angular geometry and electric powertrain integration in two-wheeled mobility. Features concept sketches, 3D renders, and design development documentation.

### 2. Readymade Motorcycle (Transportation Design)
URL: https://t-zhong.de/projects/readymade
A motorcycle design concept that reimagines the readymade philosophy in industrial design. The project combines found objects with purposeful engineering to create a unique two-wheeled vehicle that challenges conventional motorcycle design.

### 3. The Book of Time (Illustration)
URL: https://t-zhong.de/projects/illustration
An extensive illustrated book project exploring the concept of time through visual storytelling and artistic expression. Contains 25 illustrated pages showcasing diverse illustration techniques and narrative design.

### 4. LittleEasy Table (Furniture Design)
URL: https://t-zhong.de/projects/little
A minimalist table design focusing on simplicity, functionality, and elegant form. The project emphasizes ease of assembly and living, with clean lines and thoughtful material choices.

## Site Structure

- / - Homepage with about section and project showcases
- /design - Grid view of all design projects
- /contact - Contact information and social links
- /projects/tesla - Tesla Cyberrad project detail
- /projects/readymade - Readymade Motorcycle project detail
- /projects/illustration - The Book of Time project detail
- /projects/little - LittleEasy Table project detail
- /impressum - Legal notice (German law requirement)

## Technical Implementation

Framework: Next.js 16 (App Router)
Language: TypeScript
Styling: Tailwind CSS v4
Animations: Framer Motion
Fonts: Barlow (Google Fonts, self-hosted)
Rendering: Static Site Generation (SSG)
SEO: JSON-LD structured data, Open Graph, Twitter Cards, sitemap.xml
